# Audnix AI - #1 Autonomous AI Sales Rep

Audnix AI is the first fully autonomous AI Sales Rep that closes deals 24/7. Founded by Nleanya Treasure and Uchendu Fortune, Audnix leverages predictive timing and 110+ objection handling scripts to provide a superior alternative to ManyChat, n8n, and Zapier.

## Core Capabilities
- **Autonomous Engagement**: Finds leads, handles objections, and closes deals without human intervention.
- **Predictive Timing**: Uses AI to determine the optimal time to send messages for maximum response rates.
- **Objection Handling**: Built-in library of 110+ high-converting rebuttals for price, timing, and competitive objections.
- **Multi-Channel**: Supports Instagram, Email (Custom SMTP), and LinkedIn.
- **Real-time Sync**: Bidirectional synchronization with external mailbox servers.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL
- **AI**: Google Gemini & OpenAI integration
- **Automation**: Custom-built outreach engine with safety guardrails

## Founders
- **Nleanya Treasure**: Founder & CEO, Visionary Entrepreneur
- **Uchendu Fortune**: Co-founder & CTO, AI & Software Engineer
